name: Accordion
description: Accordion groups a collection of contents in tabs.

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the active panel or an array of values in multiple mode.

props.name: multiple
props.description: When enabled, multiple tabs can be activated at the same time.

props.name: activeIndex
props.description: Index of the active tab or an array of indexes in multiple mode.

props.name: lazy
props.description: When enabled, hidden tabs are not rendered at all. Defaults to false that hides tabs with css.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: selectOnFocus
props.description: When enabled, the focused tab is activated.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: update:value
events.description: Emitted when the active panel changes.

events.name: update:activeIndex
events.description: Emitted when the active tab changes.

events.name: tab-open
events.description: Callback to invoke when a tab gets expanded.

events.name: tab-close
events.description: Callback to invoke when an active tab is collapsed by clicking on the header.

events.name: tab-click
events.description: Callback to invoke when an active tab is clicked.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot to detect AccordionTab components.
